preamble.summary: Jeremiah buys a field during the siege. MT ch. 32 = LXX ch. 39. LXX is shorter, especially in the prayer section.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX abbreviates Jeremiah's prayer (vv. 17-25 in MT). Several phrases of praise are shorter or absent in LXX.

variant_notes: LXX and MT are substantially identical here.
